activePhase.name: Phase 18 — Core Architecture Isolation & Snapshot Lock
activePhase.description: Establishment of cryptographic lock systems, structural version integrity registries, and manual/partial restore strategies to ensure the protection of the modular runtime prior to final cognitive expansion.

history.name: Ecosystem Integration Final
achievements: Google Home API and Graph synchronization bridge with OAuth/Firebase.
TriggerCMD desktop automation real-time sync with token hydration.
Calm Runtime Mode to reduce socket storming and connection floods.

history.name: Core Architecture Freeze & Task Queue Stabilization
achievements: Stable unique TaskRuntime and CommandExecutionQueue introduced.
AndroidRuntimeManager integration finalized for Android-first interactions.
Recovery Engine, degraded status gates, and auth-scoped persistence.

history.name: Distributed System Coherence
achievements: PresenceRuntime stabilized with multi-node awareness and fallback lease.
EnvironmentRuntime lock avoiding duplicate primary node state corruption.

strictlyProhibited: Altering auth-scoped or session serialization logic
Modifying SpeechPipeline audio input buffering/streaming behavior
